title: Endpoint telemetry for custom model serving endpoints is generally available ​
body:
**June 11, 2026**

Endpoint telemetry for [custom model serving endpoints](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/custom-models) is now [generally available](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). Configure endpoint telemetry to persist OpenTelemetry logs, traces, and metrics from your endpoints to Unity Catalog tables. See [Persist custom model serving data to Unity Catalog](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/custom-model-serving-uc-logs).
